zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，关注突破延续
zh.content:
SOL/USD现报85.82，24小时波动有限，价格维持在日内区间85.63至86之间运行。当前走势整体偏震荡，但价格持续站稳20日均线84.18上方，显示短线多头仍具一定控制力。

从技术指标看，MACD维持正值，说明市场仍存在上行动能，虽然上涨力度暂未明显放大，但空头压制也相对有限。RSI数据暂缺，意味着需重点观察后续成交量与价格配合，确认趋势方向。

关键支撑位位于85.60附近，若失守可能回踩84.20一线；上方短线阻力集中在86至87区域，一旦有效突破，市场有望进一步测试88关口。当前结构更偏向区间整理后的方向选择阶段。

交易策略上，激进交易者可关注86上方放量突破后的顺势跟进机会，稳健者则等待回踩84.50至85区域企稳再考虑布局。若价格跌破20日均线，应适当控制仓位，防范短线回调风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading in a relatively stable range near 85.82, holding above the 20-day simple moving average at 84.18. This positioning suggests short-term bullish control remains intact despite the muted 24-hour decline of 0.12%. Price action near the daily high of 86 indicates buyers are still active, although momentum appears constrained by overhead resistance. The market currently reflects consolidation rather than a decisive breakout, with traders waiting for stronger directional confirmation.

The positive MACD reading at 0.3759 points to improving bullish momentum, even though the signal line is unavailable for full crossover confirmation. This typically indicates underlying buying pressure remains stronger than selling activity. RSI data is unavailable, limiting overbought or oversold evaluation, but the narrow trading range between 85.63 and 86 implies momentum is cooling after recent advances. As long as SOL continues to trade above the SMA(20), broader short-term sentiment remains cautiously constructive.

Immediate support is developing around 85.60, which aligns closely with the session low and recent consolidation base. A break below this zone could expose downside movement toward the 84.20 region near the moving average. On the upside, resistance is clearly forming near 86.00, with a stronger breakout barrier likely around 87.20 if bullish momentum accelerates. Sustained closes above resistance could trigger renewed buying interest and potentially attract momentum traders back into the market.

For short-term traders, buying near support while maintaining tight stop-loss protection below 84 may offer a favorable risk-to-reward setup. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for a confirmed breakout above 86 before entering long positions. Aggressive bearish trades appear less attractive while price remains above the 20-day average and MACD stays positive. Overall, the technical structure favors cautious bullish continuation, though conviction remains moderate until volatility and volume expand meaningfully.
